context: Tests whether the agent implements inventory reservation using an atomic database UPDATE with availability check in the WHERE clause, wraps it in a transaction, uses Promise.allSettled for parallel channel pushes, respects per-channel allocations, skips pushing to DTC, updates last_synced_at, and documents real-time event triggering.

checklist.name: Atomic reservation UPDATE
checklist.description: reserveInventory uses an UPDATE statement that increments reserved AND checks (quantity_on_hand - reserved) >= quantity in the same WHERE clause (not a separate SELECT then UPDATE)

checklist.name: Transaction wrapping
checklist.description: reserveInventory wraps the UPDATE and any subsequent inserts inside a database transaction

checklist.name: Promise.allSettled for fan-out
checklist.description: pushInventoryToChannels uses Promise.allSettled() (not Promise.all()) when iterating over channel listings

checklist.name: Per-channel allocation cap
checklist.description: When pushing to a channel, the quantity is capped at allocated_qty when that value is greater than 0 (using Math.min or equivalent), otherwise the full available quantity is used

checklist.name: DTC skipped in push
checklist.description: The DTC channel is explicitly skipped (no push call) during the channel sync fan-out

checklist.name: last_synced_at updated
checklist.description: After a successful push to each channel, the code updates last_synced_at on the channel_listings row

checklist.name: Event-driven sync triggers
checklist.description: design-notes.md states that inventory syncs should be triggered on order reservation, fulfillment, AND return events (not only on a schedule)

checklist.name: Real-time vs scheduled
checklist.description: design-notes.md explicitly explains why relying solely on scheduled jobs is insufficient (stale inventory / oversell risk)

checklist.name: Safety stock buffers mentioned
checklist.description: design-notes.md or code comments mention that per-channel allocated_qty buffers prevent a single high-velocity channel from draining all shared stock

checklist.name: Error on insufficient inventory
checklist.description: reserveInventory throws an error (or equivalent) when the atomic UPDATE affects 0 rows (i.e. insufficient available inventory)
